title: Facturatiebeleid
content: Invoices are issued monthly on the first business day. Customers can request clarification within 30 days. Duplicate billing must be investigated within 5 working days.

title: Wijziging verzekering
content: Customers may change their insurance package once per quarter. Address changes must be processed before coverage changes are finalized.

title: Bezwaarprocedure
content: Customers can submit a formal objection by phone, email, or online form. Escalation to a senior case handler is possible if the first review is rejected.

title: Documentvereisten
content: Accepted documents include a valid passport, national ID card, proof of address, and recent bank statement.

title: Betalingsregeling
content: Customers with outstanding balances may request a payment plan in installments. Missed installments can result in cancellation of the arrangement.
